title: Progress Tracking Column
excerpt: I have added the progress tracking column to a project board but noticed that the column settings are referencing incorrect columns. I want it to reference the start date and end date and calculate the percentage complet…

posts.author: bonniedp (Bonnie du Plessis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have added the progress tracking column to a project board but noticed that the column settings are referencing incorrect columns. I want it to reference the start date and end date and calculate the percentage complete. How do I change the columns referenced in the settings screen?

Progress Tracking319×405 23.3 KB

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bonniedp,

It is referencing your status columns. Simply uncheck the ones you don’t want to include in the tracking.

What if we could break free of the Formula column? and write formulas that update any type of columns? What if a formula could update multiple columns at once? This is possible with the Advanced Formula Booster app.
